author: lOrm
content: Landed src/tools/task_output.rs as a TaskOutputTool parity: takes agent_id, returns new buffered output since last poll plus 'status=running|finished turns=N bytes_total=M' footer. Extended BackgroundAgent with output_buffer (Mutex<Vec<String>>) and output_bytes_total (AtomicU64); added BackgroundAgentManager::append_output / poll_output. 5 tests pin: missing arg / unknown agent / empty buffer / drain semantics / finished status. Registered in tools::registry as 'task_output'.
